Subject: Request for One-Week Extension of Contract-Review Deadline

Dear [Opposing Counsel],

I hope this message finds you well. I am writing to request a brief extension of our current deadline for completing the contract review. In light of ongoing scheduling demands on our end, we would be grateful for an additional week to finalize our comments, which would move the deadline to [new date]. This additional time will help ensure that our review is thorough and that any redlines we provide are well-considered.

Please let me know at your earliest convenience whether this extension is acceptable, or if you would prefer to discuss an alternative timeline. We appreciate your flexibility and remain committed to moving the matter forward promptly. Thank you for your time and consideration.

Best regards,
[Your Name]
[Title / Firm]
[Contact Information]
